display_name: DeepSeek-V3.1 is a hybrid model that supports both thinking mode and non-thinking mode. Compared to the previous version, this upgrade brings improvements in multiple aspects: Hybrid thinking mode: On
description: DeepSeek-V3.1 is a hybrid model that supports both thinking mode and non-thinking mode. Compared to the previous version, this upgrade brings improvements in multiple aspects: Hybrid thinking mode: One model supports both thinking mode and non-thinking mode by changing the chat template. Smarter tool calling: Through post-training optimization, the model's performance in tool usage and agent tasks has significantly improved. Higher thinking efficiency: DeepSeek-V3.1-Think achieves comparable answer quality to DeepSeek-R1-0528, while responding more quickly.
